# @httpx-ru/opencode-restrictions-plugin v${{ steps.pkg.outputs.version }}

## Changes

<!-- generated by --generate-notes -->

## Usage

```jsonc
// .opencode/restrict.json
{
  "agents": {
    "allowed": ["build", "plan", "code-reviewer"]
  },
  "models": {
    "allowed": ["bothub/deepseek-v4-flash"]
  },
  "skills": {
    "allowed": ["test-skill"]
  }
}
```

```jsonc
// opencode.json
{
  "plugin": ["@httpx-ru/opencode-restrictions-plugin"]
}
```
